title: Henbrandt 200 x Water Bombs 6 Assorted Colours 10 Packs of 20 Water Bomb Balloons for Birthdays and Summer Fun Garden Party Games Party Favour Loot Bag Filler for Kids
features: 10 packs of 20 water balloons – 200 water bomb balloons in total.
These colourful water balloons make a fantastic game for kids and adults on hot summer days!
Carefully fill the water bombs at a tap, seal them up, then divide into teams and throw them at the opposition!
Colours included: Blue, Green, Orange, Pink, Red, Yellow.
Adult supervision required, not for children under 3.
description: These bright neon water balloons are the perfect summer fun for garden party games, birthday parties and outdoor events. Divide into teams according to colour or let chaos reign and play everyone for themselves with this bumper pack of water bombs! The water balloons are best suited for outdoor use and ideally require plenty of space. Unfilled water bombs can also make great party favours, lucky dip prizes, and loot bag fillers. 10 packs per order, and each pack contains 20 water bomb balloons in 6 assorted colours. To use the water bombs, simply fill them up at a tap and seal them up. Do not overfill, and make sure you dispose of the water bombs responsibly after use. Unfilled water bomb balloons and fragments of burst water bombs can be a choking hazard, so do not leave children unsupervised. Not for children under 3.
